recommendations.title: Queen Christina
recommendations.overview: Popular monarch Queen Christina of Sweden must choose between love and loyalty to her nation when she unexpectedly falls for a Spanish envoy.

recommendations.title: Doctor Zhivago
recommendations.overview: The life of a Russian physician and poet who, although married to another, falls in love with a political activist's wife and experiences hardship during World War I and then the October Revolution.

recommendations.title: Maudie
recommendations.overview: Canadian folk artist Maud Lewis falls in love with a fishmonger while working for him as a live-in housekeeper.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Sanam Teri Kasam
recommendations.overview: Tough ex-convict Inder and traditional mousy Saraswati fall in love and get married, but a tragedy changes their lives forever. The film is a modern rendition of the legends of Shiva-Sati and the novel "Love Story" by Eric Segal.

recommendations.title: The Lion in Winter
recommendations.overview: Henry II and his estranged queen, Eleanor of Aquitaine, battle over the choice of an heir.

recommendations.title: Jodhaa Akbar
recommendations.overview: A sixteenth century love story about a marriage of alliance that gave birth to true love between a Mughal emperor and a Rajput princess.

recommendations.title: The Illusionist
recommendations.overview: A French illusionist travels to Scotland to work. He meets a young woman in a small village. Their ensuing adventure in Edinburgh changes both their lives forever.

recommendations.title: Downton Abbey
recommendations.overview: The beloved Crawleys and their intrepid staff prepare for the most important moment of their lives. A royal visit from the King and Queen of England will unleash scandal, romance and intrigue that will leave the future of Downton hanging in the balan

recommendations.title: Latin Blood – The Ballad of Ney Matogrosso
recommendations.overview: From a repressive childhood to artistic revolution, Ney Matogrosso transforms Brazil's stages — and himself — through music, creativity and inner fire.
